prose:
**Pyridine frontier-orbital result** — computed HOMO–LUMO gap = **6.1398131 eV**.

**Method/provenance:** DFT frontier-orbitals single-point calculation using tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in **PySCF**; density fitting was **not** enabled. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (11 atoms), not re-optimized in this task. Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge **0**, multiplicity **1**. SCF converged: **true** in **10** cycles. Engine integrity verdict: **trustworthy = true**.

Additional returned values: HOMO = **-7.2525992 eV**; LUMO = **-1.112786 eV**; total electronic energy = **-6758.7152 eV** (**-248.3782 Hartree**). The orbital gap is a Kohn–Sham orbital energy difference, not an excitation energy.

Warnings: no warnings were reported by the tool result.

Reproducibility: chemkit command returned was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmv_cot80/live.json`. Result JSON path in that command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmv_cot80/live.json`. The returned chemkit JSON did not include a live `.out` log path, so I will not fabricate one.
